mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_ppe_history WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY action_date DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_history WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_ppe_history WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_history WHERE history_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ppe_history ( history_id, action_type, item_name, quantity, recipient_name, recipient_dept, handler_name, action_date, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{historyId}, #{actionType}, #{itemName}, #{quantity}, #{recipientName}, #{recipientDept}, #{handlerName}, #{actionDate}, #{notes}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ppe_history SET action_type = #{actionType}, item_name = #{itemName}, quantity = #{quantity}, recipient_name = #{recipientName}, recipient_dept = #{recipientDept}, handler_name = #{handlerName}, action_date = #{actionDate}, notes = #{notes}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_history SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
